overall.description: Gameplay footage from a driving game showing a first-person perspective traveling along a coastal highway shoulder. The vehicle moves past moderate traffic including trucks, RVs, and cars, then pulls off onto a dirt turnout overlooking the ocean.

events.description: large semi-truck passes closely on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the highway shoulder next to the guardrail

notable_agents.action: semi-truck traveling in the same direction, passing the camera position

entered.detail: silver metal guardrail running parallel to the road on the left side
utility poles with overhead power lines stretching into the distance
tall pine trees lining the left side of the highway
steep hillside with scattered trees and rocky outcrops
multi-lane paved highway with white lane markings

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective driving along the shoulder of a coastal highway. A metal guardrail runs along the left side while moderate traffic including trucks and RVs passes by on the right. The environment features evergreen trees and rocky hillsides under clear midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway curve with ocean vista

events.description: road curves left revealing the ocean view on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway shoulder as the road curves gently to the left

notable_agents.action: white tour bus passing by in the traffic lane

entered.detail: blue ocean visible beyond the trees as the road curves
large boulder formation on the left side near the guardrail
tall street lamp posts along the highway

segments.scene_description: As the highway curves left, the scene opens up to reveal the ocean on the left side. The camera continues driving along the shoulder past a large rock outcrop and street lights, with a tour bus passing by on the right. The guardrail moves slightly further away as the road widens on the curve.

events.description: vehicle steers left off the paved highway onto the dirt shoulder

agents.ego_description: pulling off the highway onto a dirt turnout area and coming to a stop

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and gravel turnout area beside the highway
prominent rocky outcrop with bushes on the dirt turnout

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the paved highway onto a dirt turnout area, leaving the guardrail behind. The camera comes to a stop on the gravel shoulder next to a large rock formation, with the highway now visible to the right and the ocean still visible in the distance to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective traveling along a coastal highway that eventually transitions into a quiet dirt overlook. It begins by driving along a metal guardrail under a clear midday sun, passing trucks and RVs amidst a landscape of evergreen trees and rocky hillsides. As the highway curves left, the scene opens up to reveal the ocean on the left side while the camera glides past a large rock outcrop and a passing tour bus. The movement then shifts as the vehicle exits the paved road, leaving the guardrail behind to enter a gravel turnout. Finally, the camera comes to a stop beside a large rock formation, positioning the highway to the right and the distant ocean to the left.
